title: unused config
description: unused.config.jsonc / unused.config.json contract (PRD §6, ADR 0010). Hand-authored mirror of packages/unused/src/frontends/ts/config.ts's validateConfig — keep in lockstep. Shipped for editor autocomplete/validation only; the CLI's own hand-rolled validator (config.ts) is authoritative at runtime and produces the exit-3 error text (cli-ux §6).

entry.description: Glob patterns seeding ADDITIONAL production entrypoints, on top of zero-config auto-detection.

project.description: Glob patterns narrowing the analyzed file set. Absent = every discovered file is in scope.

ignore.description: Glob patterns excluded from analysis entirely — an ignored file is never discovered, claimed, or a root.

ignoreDependencies.description: Dependency names/patterns excluded from dependency-unused claims.

workspaces.description: Per-package overrides, keyed by the package's root-relative directory or its package.json name.

presets.description: Named framework presets (T4.4). Presence — even an empty array — forces exactly this set, overriding auto-detection.

ciSecondsPerTestFile.description: Overrides the T5.3 zombie-test CI-seconds average (default 5) — docs/design/report-and-badge.md §3.

threshold.description: The confidence floor `unused check` gates on (default high). Parsed/validated at M4; consumed by the CI gate at M7.
